title: The Siege
description: Gothic, late medieval equipment and visual enchantments for vanilla.
body:
This resource pack brings the appearance of equipment closer to the Gothic Middle Ages. The armor has been changed, some mobs and sounds, weapons and tools will look different depending on the enchantment.
**OptiFine not required.**
![Enchantments (bane of arthropods, sharpness, smite, fire aspect) will visualisation on weapons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6ed1884d8e1b6c77ae1e76a6d474fbdd77759ad.png)
![others](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69ac333502d20baf08e292f37658f6b1627fbe85_0.webp)
![armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfc92fac9a3997fb8f54d6f58b89f2f3b02ee4f2_0.webp)
